title: ilex umbellata var. genuina
intro: Ilex umbellata var. genuina, also known as the American holly, is a deciduous shrub native to North America, characterized by its glossy leaves and red berries. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support immune function. The health benefits of Ilex umbellata var. genuina include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent illness.
